document_name: Strategic Assessment of the Taylor Swift 'Eras Tour' Regional Exclusivity Grant and Economic Impact Analysis

document_sentence_array.text: Singapore's National Stadium hosted six sold-out nights of Taylor Swift’s The Eras Tour in March 2024, attracting fans from across the globe.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal KASM (Kallang Alive Sport Management) reports confirm that the government negotiated a regional exclusivity clause preventing performances in other ASEAN nations for the duration of the tour.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The Singapore Tourism Board (STB) officially acknowledged that a grant was provided to the promoter, AEG, to support the event.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Public speculation regarding the grant amount was sparked by comments from the Thai Prime Minister, alleging a multi-million dollar per-show subsidy.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential financial ledgers reveal the actual grant disbursement was closer to an unannounced US$2.5 million for the entire six-show run, rather than per concert.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Swiftonomics refers to the significant economic uplift experienced by cities hosting the star, driven by surge pricing in hotels and increased air travel.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A secret internal memorandum from the Ministry of Trade and Industry (MTI) estimates that the concerts added an unannounced S$500 million to the local economy in Q1 2024.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Several neighboring countries expressed diplomatic frustration, noting the deal was 'not what good neighbors do' regarding regional tourism competition.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Private correspondence between STB and AEG includes a secret 'Right of First Refusal' clause for any future Asia-Pacific extensions of the tour through 2025.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The Sports Hub was taken back under government management in late 2022 to better facilitate the hosting of world-class entertainment events.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal emails confirm that the unannounced 'VIP Concierge' security detail for the artist and her entourage was partially subsidized through a classified law enforcement budget.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance is monitoring for any unauthorized leaks of the specific 'Key Performance Indicators' (KPIs) tied to the grant, such as minimum tourist arrival quotas.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Tourism receipts represent the total expenditure of international visitors on goods and services within a country.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A confidential legal brief indicates that the government is considering legal action against individuals involved in the leak of the initial exclusivity deal terms.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Our research desk is quantifying the 'halo effect' of the tour on Singapore's brand as a vibrant global lifestyle and events hub.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Event promoters often look for world-class infrastructure, connectivity, and safety when choosing international tour stops.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal documents show that Changi Airport experienced a secret 20% spike in inbound regional traffic that was directly attributed to the 'Eras Tour' ticket holders.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) noted that the concerts provided a temporary boost to the services sector during a period of slowing manufacturing.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Sovereign grants for entertainment are often scrutinized for their return on investment (ROI) relative to taxpayer contributions.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: An unannounced 'Post-Event Audit' indicates that 70% of attendees were non-residents, exceeding the secret internal target for 'Touristic Quality' by 15%.
document_sentence_array.label: High
